name: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
original_name: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
overview: As the Dragon Master, Po has endured his fair share of epic challenges but nothing could prepare him for his greatest one yet-as a Kung Fu teacher to a group of rambunctious kids from Panda Village who have been imbued with a mysterious and powerful chi energy. Together they embark on amazing adventures, battle ferocious villains, and become legends!

trailers.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny Season 1 - Official Trailer | Prime Video Kids
